Notwithstanding the opposition
{ of the local Laundrymen associa-
ton, the Shirt Waist and Laundry
Workers International union has
been successful In organizing a To-
cal union in this city.


The work or organizing the laun-
dry workers was accomplished by
Il. A. Cooney, local organizer of the
American Federation OF Labor, and
took place last Saturday night. Mr..
Cooney has had a difficult task in
obtaining foothold for the union
In this city. Perhaps In no city In
the country are the laundry proprie-
tors so well entrenched as in Spo-
kane Not only do they control the
local situation absolutely. but they
control the purchasing of supplies
and machinery, no one being able to
buy machinery or other supplies for
. laundry In Spokane without their
consent


The new union starts off with a
good membership and has succeed
ed In unlonizing the Eastern Laun-
dry Co. The men and women EN-
ployed In that establishment w as
